title: [Bug]: Correct typos in AttributesTable style keys and AccordionLinks class names
what_to_do: Search the Jaeger UI source code (likely in the `packages/jaeger-ui` directory) for the `AttributesTable` and `AccordionLinks` React components. Fix the specific string typos in the CSS class names and style keys. Run the frontend test suite and linter to ensure the UI builds correctly.

title: Some resources' live manifests can't be viewed in the UI since server cluster role lacks list permission
labels: bug, good first issue, component:rbac, component:server, version:2.12
what_to_do: Locate the Argo CD server's ClusterRole definitions, likely in `manifests/base/cluster-rbac/argocd-server-clusterrole.yaml` or the Helm chart templates. Add the `list` verb to the appropriate API groups and resources that are currently failing to display. Regenerate the manifests using `make manifests` to ensure all auto-generated files are updated.
